---
name: Hardware report
about: Report whether the firmware works on your ESP32-2432S028R / CYD board
title: "Hardware report: "
labels: hardware-report
assignees: ""
---

## Board

- Board name / seller listing:
- ESP32 module marking:
- Display controller if known:
- Touch controller if known:

## Firmware

- Commit or release:
- Did you change `platformio.ini`? If yes, what changed?

## Result

- [ ] Boots
- [ ] Backlight works
- [ ] Image orientation is correct
- [ ] Colors look correct
- [ ] Touch works
- [ ] Wi-Fi/NTP works
- [ ] Auto-brightness works

## Notes

Add serial logs with private info removed, plus any notes about changes needed
for your board.
